children.title: Elective Courses
children.note: Students are required to take a total of 27 units of elective courses from the area which corresponds to the 2nd Major chosen by them. 6-15 units to be taken from Group A, and 12-21 units from Group B, of which at least 12 units of courses should be from 3000 or above level (including at least 6 units of courses at 4000 level). Areas
Group A: Courses offered by CUHK: EEEN4020, ELEG3201, 3301, 3302, 4304, MASE3102, 3104, 4102 Group B: Courses offered by CUHK
(CUHK) Group A: Courses offered by CUHK: CHEM4280, EEEN4020, 4050, EESC4240, MAEG4080, MASE2202, 4206, 4302 Group B: Courses offered by CUHK
(CUHK) Group A: Courses offered by CUHK: MAEG3020, 4010, 4020, 4080, MASE2202, 3002, 3202, 4204 Group B: Courses offered by CUHK
Group A: Courses offered by CUHK: CHEM3230, 4303, 4786, MASE2202, 3002, 4206 Group B: Courses offered by CUHK

Group A: Courses offered by CUHK(SZ): CHM3130, 3530, 3540, 4330, ENE3005, MSE3002, 3009, 3510, 4005, PHY2002, 4960 Group B: Courses offered by CUHK(SZ): BIO1001, 2002, BME3001, 3006, 4007, CSC3002, ECE2001, 4010, ENE3004, 3006, MAT2001, 2040, MSE3405, 4570, PHY3007, 3310, 3410, 4001, 4510, 4720 Students can also take the following elective courses offered by CUHK to fulfill the requirements of Group B
